headline: Molina Healthcare Weighs Special Meetings As Valuation And Margins Draw Focus
summary: Molina Healthcare (NYSE:MOH) is seeking shareholder approval for an amendment to its Certificate of Incorporation. The proposal would allow shareholders to call special stockholder meetings under defined conditions. This change focuses on corporate governance and shareholder rights, and has not been broadly discussed in recent coverage. Molina Healthcare, trading at $139.38, is bringing a governance item to the forefront with this proposed amendment. The stock has had a 4.0% gain over the...
